title: Cancer Patients with Oral Thrush: 8 Herbal Teas for Relief
description: Eucalyptus globulus teas have been used to help manage oral thrush, a fungal infection in the mouth. The reason for this is due to the tea's antimicrobial properties, which come from compounds like eucalyptol and alpha-pinene. These compounds help kill the fungus Candida albicans, the main cause of oral thrush.
